top_signals.title: School raises rights and dignity awareness through sexuality education
top_signals.summary: Guidelines from UNESCO and others outline eight key concepts of comprehensive sexuality education, including relationships, human rights, understanding gender and staying safe.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
